steps.description: Request device code. Returns deviceCode, userCode, verificationUri

steps.action: User opens verificationUri in browser, enters userCode, logs in, authorizes device

steps.description: Poll every 5s until authorized. Returns accessToken (Bearer)

scopes.description: Post, update, void, and purge transactions
Export tax data (e-Faktur, e-Bupot, PPN/PPh reports), manage fiscal adjustments, employees, salary components, and payroll

x-workflows.name: Receipt-Based Transaction
steps: Show user the draft + suggested template

x-workflows.name: Text-Based Transaction
steps: Show user the draft + suggested template

x-workflows.name: Draft Then Post (Two-Step)
x-workflows.description: DRAFT transactions store template + account mappings but have NO journal entries until posted. Use journal-preview to verify computed entries before posting.
steps: GET /api/templates (find matching template, check lines for accountHint)
POST /api/drafts (create DRAFT with templateId + accountSlots — response journalEntries will be [])
GET /api/transactions/{id}/journal-preview (preview computed entries — entries are NOT persisted)
POST /api/transactions/{id}/post (executes template, creates journal entries, sets status=POSTED)

x-workflows.name: Financial Analysis
steps: GET /api/analysis/income-statement?startDate=&endDate=&excludeClosing=true (optional: exclude closing entries for tax purposes)

x-workflows.name: Bank Reconciliation
steps: Review unmatched items, manual match or mark bank/book-only

x-workflows.name: New Client Onboarding from Financial Reports
steps: Receive client's existing financial reports (PDF/XLS: neraca, laba rugi, buku besar)
Extract Chart of Accounts structure, journal templates, and initial data
Generate CSV files matching expected format (see x-csv-files)

x-workflows.name: Bulk Data Import
steps: Prepare ZIP with CSV files (numbered in dependency order: 01_, 02_, etc.)

x-workflows.name: Purge Voided Transactions
x-workflows.description: Permanently delete VOID transactions and their journal entries. Response contains purged transaction details as backup.
steps: DELETE /api/transactions/purge-voided (purge all, or ?before=YYYY-MM-DD to limit scope)

x-workflows.name: Fiscal Adjustments (Koreksi Fiskal)
steps: POST /api/fiscal-adjustments (create: description, adjustmentCategory=PERMANENT|TEMPORARY, adjustmentDirection=POSITIVE|NEGATIVE, amount, accountCode, year)

x-workflows.name: Payroll Processing
steps: POST /api/employees (create employee with PTKP status, hire date)
POST /api/payroll (create payroll run for period, e.g. payrollPeriod=2025-06)

x-workflows.name: PPh 21 Annual / 1721-A1
steps: Ensure all 12 monthly payroll runs are calculated for the year
GET /api/pph21/summary?year=2025 (annual PPh 21 summary for SPT Badan Lampiran III)

x-workflows.name: SPT Tahunan Badan Data Export
x-workflows.description: Export lampiran SPT Tahunan PPh Badan per PER-11/PJ/2025. All endpoints support JSON (default) and Excel (?format=excel) for Coretax DJP Converter import.
steps: GET /api/tax-export/spt-tahunan/l1?year=2025 (L1 Rekonsiliasi Fiskal — P&L, koreksi fiskal, kompensasi rugi, PKP, PPh Badan)
GET /api/tax-export/spt-tahunan/l4?year=2025 (L4 Penghasilan Final — PPh 4(2) per kode objek pajak)
GET /api/tax-export/spt-tahunan/l9?year=2025 (L9 Penyusutan & Amortisasi — DJP Converter DATA+REF format)
GET /api/tax-export/spt-tahunan/transkrip-8a?year=2025 (Transkrip 8A Laporan Keuangan — Neraca + Laba Rugi)
GET /api/tax-export/ebupot-pph21?year=2025 (BPA1 e-Bupot PPh 21 1721-A1 — DJP Converter format, all employees)
GET /api/tax-export/financial-statements/pdf?year=2025 (Combined Neraca + Laba Rugi PDF for Coretax upload)
GET /api/tax-export/coretax/spt-badan?year=2025 (Coretax-compatible structured JSON — all fields plain numbers for direct entry)

x-workflows.name: Fiscal Loss Carryforward Management
x-workflows.description: Track fiscal losses (rugi fiskal) that can be carried forward up to 5 years per UU PPh Pasal 6 ayat 2. Losses are automatically applied FIFO in L1 report.
steps: GET /api/fiscal-adjustments/loss-carryforward?year=2025 (list active loss carryforwards for year)

x-csv-files.notes: Essential for new client setup. industry: it-service|online-seller|coffee-shop|campus
account_type: ASSET|LIABILITY|EQUITY|REVENUE|EXPENSE. normal_balance: DEBIT|CREDIT. parent_code: empty for top-level, parent's code for sub-accounts

category: INCOME|EXPENSE|PAYMENT|RECEIPT|TRANSFER. cash_flow_category: OPERATING|INVESTING|FINANCING. template_type: SIMPLE|VARIABLE|SPLIT|MULTI_LINE. Pipe-delimited multi-values: keywords, example_merchants, merchant_patterns
position: DEBIT|CREDIT. formula: AMOUNT (full value), AMOUNT * 0.11 (PPN 11%), etc.
Optional. Maps merchant names to journal templates for AI auto-matching.
Optional. For migrating existing transaction data.
